mandatoryCompletionGate.evidence: Owner supplied brand, keyword, domain, reference site, and main function.
Static gates and node --check worker.js passed.
Four plans map to black img generation/download/template/custom prompt capabilities.
SEO metadata, FAQ schema, robots, sitemap, llms, and performance fallback evidence are present.
GitHub public repository clauxel/blackimg-online was created and main was pushed at commit 922d558.
Cloudflare zone is active; SpaceShip registrar reports archer/sydney Cloudflare nameservers; public DNS returns Cloudflare NS with no stale DS Answer; apex and www HTTPS return HTTP/2 200.
PayPal, Turnstile, and AI provider secrets are missing.

IndexNow accepted the homepage and llms.txt with HTTP 202. GSC and Bing Webmaster submissions are blocked because their credentials are unavailable in the local secure credential store and the current environment.
Built-in browser network navigation to the live domain timed out twice and stayed at about:blank; direct HTTPS/API fallback checks are recorded.
Report center entry, site registry record, and changelog exist; final status must be updated after deploy attempt.

completionLedger.evidence: Local homepage and Worker gates passed.

Domain, DNS, HTTPS, /checkout/, runtime, robots, sitemap, IndexNow, and 404 checks pass. Provider secrets, paid checkout, paid AI generation, optional D1 analytics, GSC/Bing submissions, and browser live flow are not all complete.
